zh.lifeSummary: 當Moira Macdonald of Moidart於1375年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart25歲，母親Mary Stewart15歲。她於1393年與Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Moira Macdonald of Moidart于1375年出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart25岁，母亲Mary Stewart15岁。她于1393年与Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓。

nameMeanings.name: Macdonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Moira
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Moira Macdonald of Moidart was born in 1375, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart, was 25 and her mother, Mary Stewart, was 15. She married Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan in 1393, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1442, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Moira Macdonald of Moidart est née en 1375, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Stewart, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan en 1393, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1442, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Moira Macdonald of Moidart 1375 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart 25 und ihre Mutter Mary Stewart 15. Sie hat 1393 in Schottland, United Kingdom Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1442 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Moira Macdonald of Moidart è nata il nel 1375 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mary Stewart, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan nel 1393, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1442, nel Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Moira Macdonald of Moidartが1375年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidartは25歳，母Mary Stewartは15歳であった。1393年にイギリススコットランドでMalcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンで67歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Moira Macdonald of Moidart(이)가 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Stewart(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1393년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Moira Macdonald of Moidart nasceu em 1375, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Stewart, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan em 1393, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1442, em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Moira Macdonald of Moidart родилась в 1375 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Stewart, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan в 1393 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1442 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Moira Macdonald of Moidart nació en 1375, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Allan MacDonald 2nd of Clanranald and Moidart, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Stewart, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan en 1393, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1442, en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
